ddls:
CREATE TABLE "homographs" (
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each homograph */,
  "word" TEXT /* The homograph word itself */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech (e.g., verb, noun) for the homograph */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Definition of the homograph */,
  "example_sentence" TEXT /* Example sentence for the homograph */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the homograph was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the homograph was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("homograph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentences" (
  "sentence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentence record */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph referenced in the sentence */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* The sentence utilizing the homograph */,
  "start_index" INTEGER /* Start index of the homograph in the sentence */,
  "end_index" INTEGER /* End index of the homograph in the sentence */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the sentence (e.g., book, article, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentence was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentences_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., educator, student, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contexts" (
  "context_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each context record */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding homograph */,
  "context_description" TEXT /* Description of the context in which the homograph is used */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage of the homograph in the context */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the context was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the context was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("context_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contexts_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag for categorization purposes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "homograph_tags" (
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag associated with the homograph */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("homograph_id", "tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph related to the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., viewed, tagged) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when the activity occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user when the activity occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph being commented on */,
  "comment" TEXT /* User comment about the homograph */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph being analyzed */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Count of views for the homograph */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date when the homograph was last accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analytics record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource record */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph related to the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., video, article, worksheet) */,
  "resource_url" TEXT /* URL of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_resources_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph related to the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the collaboration */,
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., editor, reviewer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the collaboration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborator_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "homograph_id" INTEGER /* ID of the homograph related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (true/false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_homograph_id FOREIGN KEY ("homograph_id") REFERENCES homographs ("homograph_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
